name: L-4 extract-patterns assigns a deterministic id that includes the source PR number per pattern
command: printf '%s' '{"number":42,"comments":[{"body":"please add null check before dereferencing"}]}' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --out patterns.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("patterns.json","utf8"));process.exit(a[0].id==="p-42-1"?0:1)' && echo identified 1>&2
